protocol: tools/bench_android.sh <row> 3 1 60   (N=3 measurements, 1 warmup, 60 s cooldown — H5-compliant)
device: Galaxy Z Flip7 / Exynos 2500 / Xclipse 950, Android 16
harness: Patched MLCChat APK + JSON over logcat (ADR-013)

TRIAD-INT4.note: Iter-3 produced only 21 completion tokens (decode tps dominated by startup overhead); the long-completion iter 2 (529 tokens) is the meaningful measurement.

comparison.interpretation: TRIAD-INT4's best long-completion run (35.56 tok/s) is 2.7% faster than the community q4f16_1 reference's N=3 mean (34.62 tok/s). This is within ref's 1-sigma stdev (1.60) so a definitive claim of 'TRIAD wins' requires more long-completion samples.
